cargo.title: Cargo & Routes
cargo.loop.modeClosedDesc: returns to the starting point (repeatable farm route)
cargo.loop.modeOpenDesc: does not return to start (most profitable sequence of trips)

cargo.loop.emptyOpen: No profitable chain found for this resource.
cargo.grid.manifestEmpty: Empty manifest — add commodities or load an example.
cargo.grid.pickShip: Pick a ship to see its cargo hold.
cargo.grid.notInGuide: {{ship}} is not in the Cargo Grid guide — composition unknown.
cargo.grid.tentative: Composition to be confirmed (ambiguous guide legend).
cargo.form.title: PARAMETERS
cargo.form.noQtDefault: No stock quantum drive in catalog → time/profit-min unavailable (gross margin).
cargo.results.title: BEST ROUTES
cargo.results.empty: Pick a ship and a budget, then Calculate.
cargo.results.none: No profitable route found for these settings.
cargo.detail.title: ROUTE DETAILS
cargo.empty.noShips: No ship in your fleet. Add ships via My Fleet first.
cargo.empty.noPrices: Price cache is empty. Run the price sync (Settings → Diagnostic).
cargo.empty.noPricesCta: Go to Settings to sync prices
cargo.gps.intro: Step-by-step navigation: pick a ship and a starting location, then hop from crossroads to crossroads.
cargo.gps.pickShipFirst: Pick a ship, then load the trading graph.
cargo.gps.noStart: Pick a starting location to show the crossroads.
cargo.gps.emptyTrip: No leg yet — pick a commodity and its resale below.
cargo.gps.affTitle: Estimate (stock deficit vs average + status) — not a real traffic measure
cargo.gps.autonomyTitle: Maximum distance on a full quantum fuel tank (stock drive), from the SC Wiki API.
cargo.gps.fuelTitle: Quantum fuel consumed by this jump (SCU).
cargo.gps.refuelTitle: This jump exceeds remaining fuel: a refuel stop is needed first.
cargo.gps.refuelWarning: Range exceeded (cumulative from start) — refuel needed before leg {{n}}.

fleet.noShips: No ships yet. Add your first ship.
fleet.emptyFleet: No pledges imported yet. Use the import button to sync your RSI hangar.
fleet.searchPlaceholder: Search by pledge or ship name…

fleet.errorMessage: Unable to retrieve the fleet. Retry or check the diagnostic.
fleet.form.name: Name
settings.diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
settings.diagnostic.subtitle: Logs, stats, and recovery tools.
settings.diagnostic.actions.copyLogsHelp: Copy recent operations to clipboard as JSON
settings.diagnostic.actions.clearLogsCon: Clear the log buffer? The last 200 operations will be erased.
settings.diagnostic.actions.resetCacheHe: Delete cached resources for the active RSI account
settings.diagnostic.actions.resetCacheCo: Deletes the Electron partition Cache folder for the active account. Cookies, Local Storage, and session data are preserved. Use this if RSI scraping fails with a cache error.
settings.diagnostic.devTools.seedHelp: Insert a Praetorian Pack sample pledge into the active account
settings.diagnostic.devTools.removeHelp: Delete the seeded Praetorian Pack pledge
settings.comptes.title: ACCOUNTS
settings.comptes.subtitle: MANAGE YOUR CONFIGURED RSI ACCOUNTS
settings.comptes.emptySubtitle: Link a Roberts Space Industries account to start syncing your fleet.
settings.dataSyncSubtitle: Manage external RSI API handshakes and local telemetry ingestion.
settings.forceResyncDesc: Manually initiate the automated cycles to fetch the latest fleet data, UEX statuses, and technical telemetry directly from the RSI servers.
settings.notifSectionSubtitle: Configure telemetry priority and bridge communication protocols.
settings.notifInsuranceDesc: Notify 24h prior to LTI/SHI expiration dates.
settings.notifFleetUpdatesDesc: Receive alerts on ship manufacturer status and patch balance changes.
settings.notifMarketDesc2: High volatility alerts for CCU chains and upgrade values.
settings.notifFleetDesc: Real-time telemetry on ship location and fuel levels.
settings.notifMarketDesc: Notifications for high-value trade route price shifts.
settings.notifSystemDesc: Firmware updates and low-priority bridge diagnostics.
dashboard.secureDesc: Fleet insurance coverage and rapid asset access.
dashboard.systemCheck: System check: ok · Fuel: 98% · Quantum: standby
loadout.noShips: No ships in fleet. Add ships via My Fleet first.
loadout.noSlots: No slots. Add a slot to begin.
loadout.selectSlotFirst: Select a slot to choose a component.
loadout.noPresets: No presets. Fill fields manually in Selected Slot.
loadout.statsEmpty: Add slots and equip components to see stats.
loadout.previewMode: Ship not owned — add it to your fleet to save a loadout
loadout.emptySubtitle: Select a ship from My Fleet to open its loadout planner.
comparator.noData: No ship data. Sync UEX data from My Fleet first.
comparator.selectToChart: Select a vessel to render chart.
comparator.selectToCompare: Select two vessels above to compare stats.
comparator.emptyFleet: Add ships in My Fleet to compare them here.
comparator.subtitle: // Side-by-side tactical analysis
comparator.strategicAdvantage: {{winner}} outperforms {{loser}} by {{pct}} pts in {{axis}}, making it the superior choice for missions that demand this capability.
comparator.strategicTie: Both vessels share nearly identical tactical profiles across all measured axes.
insurance.subtitle: // Fleet coverage · expiry alerts
insurance.ltiDesc: (Lifetime Insurance) is permanent and does not require manual renewal. Standard (SHI) insurance must be renewed in aUEC before the expiry date to avoid coverage interruption.
insurance.autoRenewalPost: Please ensure sufficient UEX balances for manual renewals. Expiry changes are currently tracked.
datamining.consent.title: Offline Datamining — Enable?
datamining.consent.description: SC Fleet Manager detected your Star Citizen installation ({{channel}}). Would you like to enable offline synchronisation of ship and component data from your local game files? This source is generally more up-to-date than SC Wiki. No data is sent externally. You can disable this at any time in Settings.
datamining.patch.title: New Star Citizen patch detected
datamining.patch.description: A new version of Star Citizen has been installed. Ship data can be refreshed from the game files to reflect the patch.
craftingHub.subtitle: Catalogue of all known crafting blueprints, extracted from the game. Search, filter by category, and quick access to recipes (detailed view coming soon).
craftingHub.toast.noAccountMsg: Select an account before running the resync.
craftingHub.toast.noLogMsg: Couldn't locate your Star Citizen installation. Set the game folder in Settings > Data Sync.
craftingHub.detail.noIngredients: No ingredient referenced for this blueprint.
craftingHub.detail.findResource: See where to find this resource
craftingHub.detail.noReactiveStats: No reactive stat for this blueprint
craftingHub.detail.noLinkedMissions: No mission rewards this blueprint in the datamined pools.
craftingHub.mission.notFoundMsg: This mission is not available in the current list.
craftingHub.ing.locationsCount: {{n}} location(s) referenced in the game data.
craftingHub.ing.subtitleFallback: Data extracted from the game — provider→preset→mineable.
missionIntel.noneSyncedText: Run a synchronization from the Data Sync settings.
missionIntel.card.dataminedAria: Mission extracted from the game files
missionIntel.detail.noScope: No reputation scope linked to this mission.
missionIntel.obj.scopeUnmapped: Scope not mapped — progress tracking unavailable
missionIntel.obj.noMissionForFaction: No mission found for this faction
missionIntel.obj.comingSoonMsg: Detailed optimal plan available in Phase 25a.5.4.
missionIntel.obj.emptyText: Add missions as objectives from the Missions tab to track your progress.
missionIntel.fav.emptyText: Save your favorite missions to find them quickly and plan your runs. Click ☆ from the Missions tab or a mission detail.
dataSync.subtitle: // Data sources and extraction
dataSync.rsiActivateHint: Activate an account in the Accounts tab
dataSync.dmConsentNote: Reads the local game files (Data.p4k). No data is sent externally.
dataSync.dmNotDetectedNote: Install the game or set the install folder to enable datamining.
dataSync.scPathInvalid: Game.log not found at this path
dataSync.scPathHelp: Point this at your game channel folder (the one containing Data.p4k and Game.log, e.g. …\StarCitizen\LIVE). Used by datamining and the Crafting Hub blueprint resync.
dataSync.genSyncOnLaunchDesc: Synchronizes the catalog (ships, components, missions) at app launch if the data is stale.
dataSync.genRsiRefreshDesc: Resyncs the RSI hangar at the chosen interval. Only when a session is active — otherwise skipped, never a confirmation pop-up.
dataSync.genAutoPatchDesc: Detects a Star Citizen version change since the last extraction and sends a notification.
dataSync.genLastFullSyncDesc: Most recent synchronization across all sources.
dataSync.ccuNote: Fetches the full RSI upgrade matrix (~150 ships). Takes a few minutes; you can cancel anytime.
dataSync.ccuToastAborted: CCU sync cancelled — partial catalog kept.
hudCustom.subtitle: // Theme, layout and accessibility
hudCustom.sidebarPositionDesc: Show the navigation bar on the left or right of the screen.
hudCustom.sidebarCollapsedDesc: Starts the app with the bar in rail mode (icons only). The bar button expands it at any time.
hudCustom.animatedStarsDesc: Animated space background behind the interface.
hudCustom.autoLaunchDesc: Starts SC Fleet Manager on Windows startup. (applied immediately)
notif.subtitle: // Delivery channels and tracked events
notif.insuranceExpiryDesc: Lead time before expiry at which an alert is raised.
notif.insuranceExpiredDesc: A single notification when a ship loses its insurance (no repeated reminder).
notif.minedMissionsDesc: After an extraction, if new missions were added to the catalog.
notif.newPatchDesc: Detects a game version change and notifies it. Setting shared with the Sync tab.
notif.inAppDesc: Shows a toast in the application. The notification log is still recorded.
notif.systemDesc: Shows a Windows pop-up for alerts.
account.create.initialDesc: Sign in to your RSI account to add a new session. Your credentials are never read by this application.
account.create.step2: Sign in with your RSI credentials in the window that opens
account.create.step3a: Once signed in, navigate manually to
account.create.step4: Synchronization starts automatically as soon as you reach the Hangar page
account.create.handleHint: Will be verified automatically on sign-in.
account.create.loggingInDesc: A window has opened. Sign in to your RSI account. This window will close automatically after sign-in.
account.create.loggingInWarn: ⚠ Wait 3 seconds before entering your email and password. The app performs an automatic initialization of the RSI window.
account.create.confirmNotDetected: Handle not detected automatically. Enter it manually.
account.create.importFailed: Account created. Pledge import failed. You can retry from My Fleet.
account.create.importSuccess: Account created — {{n}} ship(s) imported from your RSI hangar.
account.create.skipImport: Account created. You can import your fleet later from My Fleet.
account.delete.title: DELETE COMMANDER
account.edit.title: EDIT COMMANDER
session.tipExpired: RSI reconnection required. Click to recheck.
session.tipNeverLogged: No RSI session. Import from RSI to connect.
fleet.rsiScrapeFailed: RSI scrape failed. Check your session.
fleet.login.activeDesc: RSI session active. You can import your hangar.
fleet.login.desc: Sign in to robertsspaceindustries.com to import your hangar. Your credentials are never stored.
fleet.import.title: RSI Hangar Import
insurance.renew.title: RENEW POLICY
insurance.renew.infoBanner: Select the coverage level and the insurance duration. The expiry date is computed automatically on save.
insurance.renew.noAccount: No RSI account configured. Connect an RSI account first.
insurance.lti.title: LIFETIME INSURANCE
insurance.lti.caption: No expiry · No renewal required
insurance.lti.description: This vessel holds a Lifetime Insurance policy. Coverage is permanent and does not require renewal. The policy cannot be downgraded to a Standard Hull Insurance policy from this interface.

starmap.noData: No cartographic data — run a datamining extraction.

ccuChain.filters.label: FILTERS
ccuChain.state.catalogEmpty: The CCU catalog is empty. Sync it from Data Sync settings to use the chain finder.
ccuChain.state.staleWarning: Catalog is over 7 days old — consider a resync for accurate prices.
ccuChain.state.pickBoth: Pick a FROM and a TARGET ship to find upgrade chains.
ccuChain.state.noPaths: No chain found with the current filters.

settings.page.title: Settings
settings.page.subtitle: Accounts, data, interface and notifications
settings.comptes.sectionSubtitle: RSI login, synchronization and commander management
settings.donnees.sectionSubtitle: SC Wiki ship catalog (specs, manufacturers, roles)
settings.navbar.sectionSubtitle: Pin up to 5 shortcuts in the bottom bar
settings.hud.sectionSubtitle: Accent color, animations and visual intensity
settings.notif.sectionSubtitle: Fleet alerts, missions and notification channels
settings.datamining.sectionSubtitle: Game data extraction (StarBreaker): ships, blueprints, mining, map
settings.donnees.introSuffix: from the SC Wiki API and fills the local database (~350 ships). Powers the Comparator, detail sheets, fleet filters and the Loadout Planner.
settings.donnees.introDuration: A full sync takes ~30 to 90 s.
settings.donnees.compIntroSuffix: (weapons, shields, coolers, generators, quantum drives, missiles — ~2500) that power the Loadout Planner pickers.
settings.donnees.missionsIntroSuffix: catalog from the SC Wiki API (~1000 to 2000 missions). Powers the Mission Intel page (search, filters, favorites, objectives).
settings.donnees.blueprintsIntroSuffix: catalog from the SC Wiki API (~1500 recipes: ingredients, crafting times, unlock missions). Powers the Crafting Hub page.
settings.donnees.starmapIntroSuffix: (systems, planets, moons, stations) from the Star Citizen Wiki (online, no game install). Powers the Galactic Map. Requires the Cargo data to be synced first.
settings.donnees.cargoIntroBold: locations (SC Wiki positions, for distances) and UEX prices + real stock.
settings.donnees.cargoIntroSuffix: Run the locations sync once, then UEX prices regularly. UEX is public (no token).
settings.donnees.catalogIntroSuffix: (purchase and rental in aUEC, geolocated). Public read.
settings.donnees.catalogItemsResult: Catalog synced — {{items}} sold items · {{categories}} categories · {{prices}} sale points.
settings.donnees.catalogVehiclesResult: Vehicles synced — purchase {{buy}} vehicles ({{buyPoints}} pts) · rental {{rent}} vehicles ({{rentPoints}} pts).
settings.donnees.ccuIntroSuffix: (ship → ship upgrades) from RSI — ~238 starting ships, 2 requests each. Powers the CCU Chain.
settings.donnees.ccuIntroNote: Long (~several minutes). Opens an RSI window (silent if your session is already valid).
settings.donnees.syncAllHint: Runs SC Wiki data, Cargo & Map, then the UEX catalog (CCU excluded — run it separately). A failed step doesn't stop the others.
settings.donnees.groupWikiDesc: Ships + hardpoints, components, missions and blueprints (SC Wiki API).
settings.donnees.groupCargoDesc: Locations (SC Wiki) then galactic map — in that order (the map re-reads the locations).
settings.donnees.groupUexDesc: UEX prices (+ stock), item catalog and ship marketplace (UEX, public).
settings.navbar.intro: Pinned shortcuts appear as direct buttons in the bottom bar (and disappear from the "Features" menu). Maximum {{max}}.
settings.navbar.maxReached: {{max}} shortcuts maximum — unpin one to add another.
settings.comptes.noticeLoginTimeout: RSI login timed out. Try again.
settings.comptes.errNoActiveAccount: No active RSI account — log in first.
settings.comptes.noticeConnectPrompt: Log in to RSI — scraping will start automatically.
settings.comptes.deleteModalWarning: Its ships, pledges and associated data will be permanently deleted.
settings.hud.themesDesc: Per-manufacturer palette — retints the whole interface
settings.hud.starsDesc: Animated star field in the background
settings.hud.autoLaunchDesc: Start the app when Windows starts
settings.notif.thresholdDesc: Alert before a ship insurance expires
settings.notif.insuranceExpiredDesc: Notify when an insurance has expired
settings.notif.minedMissionsDesc: Notify when new datamined missions are added
settings.notif.newPatchDesc: Notify when a Star Citizen patch is detected (remember to resync datamining)
settings.gamelog.label: Game.log reader
settings.gamelog.title: Game.log reading (in-game)
settings.gamelog.desc: Detects your location, deaths and activity live from the game log. 100% local, read-only, off by default.
settings.gamelog.noLog: Game.log not found — check the install path above (launch the game at least once).
settings.datamining.noInstall: No installation detected — choose the channel folder (e.g. …\StarCitizen\LIVE).
settings.datamining.patchDetected: ⚠ New patch detected{{version}} — run an extraction again to update the data.
settings.apropos.checkError: Unable to check for updates right now.
settings.apropos.creditSuffix: for the general inspiration and the desire to develop.
settings.apropos.creditChewbacca: for the help on designing some of the tabs.
settings.apropos.licenseCopyright: SC Fleet Manager — Copyright (C) 2026 André BRIBANICK (Elios134)
settings.diagnostic.seedNotice: Test pack created. See the "Packs" section in My Fleet.
settings.diagnostic.intro: Creates a fake multi-ship pack to test the Pack Detail page without an RSI hangar.
settings.diagnostic.removePackDesc: Removes the pack and its linked ships.
settings.diagnostic.frNamesDesc: Fills producedItemNameFr from the dumps (FR global.ini). For blueprint re-checking when the game runs in French.
settings.diagnostic.frNamesNotice: FR names populated: {{written}}/{{scanned}} ({{missing}} without FR translation) — folder {{dir}}.

mission.dropNone: No known blueprint drop for this mission.
mission.noScopeForMission: No reputation scope for this mission.
mission.rankMaxNoProgress: Maximum rank — no progress within rank.
insurance.emptyNoShips: No ship — sync your RSI hangar from Settings.
insurance.ltiModalDesc: This ship has Lifetime Insurance (LTI). Its hull is covered indefinitely and will never expire — so there is nothing to renew.
crafting.title: CRAFTING HUB
crafting.catalogueEmpty: Catalogue empty — sync the game data from Settings
crafting.resyncTitle: Detect blueprints unlocked in-game (Game.log) and check them
crafting.selectPrompt: Select a blueprint from the list.
crafting.resyncLogNotFound: Game.log not found (SC installation not detected).
crafting.resyncNoneDetected: No unlocked blueprint detected in the log.
crafting.slidersHint: Sliders aligned with Star Citizen Wiki · base 500 per slot.
crafting.unmatchedHint: A suggestion is pre-filled — check it and click Map (or fix it). The mapping is remembered for future re-checks.
crafting.unmatchedNoBp: Blueprint not found — pick one from the list.

fleet.noShipsForAccount: No ship found for this account.

ccu.catalogueEmpty: CCU catalogue empty — sync first from Settings
ccu.staleWarning: The catalogue is over 7 days old — consider resyncing for accurate prices.
ccu.ltiHint: Approximation: shows ships sold as warbond (usually bundled with LTI). Not a guarantee — RSI does not expose purchase insurance status.
ccu.vatHint: RSI prices are tax-exclusive. This rate converts them to tax-inclusive to match the price shown on the RSI store (20% VAT in France).
ccu.selectFromTo: Select a departure and destination ship.
notification.title: Notifications
addAccount.title: Add an account
addAccount.description: Creates a local account. RSI login (hangar import) remains available from the sign-in screen.
addAccount.handleTooShort: The handle must be at least 2 characters long.
datamining.badge.label: Datamining
datamining.consent.localDescription: With your consent, the app can extract data <0>locally</0> from your Star Citizen installation (<1>Data.p4k</1> file) using the StarBreaker tool, then enrich the local database (ship names, blueprints, mining locations, galactic map). Everything happens on your machine — no data is sent to a third party.
datamining.consent.patchDetectedSuffix: a new extraction is recommended to update the data.
datamining.pickFolderTitle: Star Citizen installation folder (channel, e.g. LIVE)
starmap.noDataCanvas: No map data — sync the galactic map from Settings.
starmap.subtitle: Datamining
starmap.title: GALACTIC MAP
starmap.emptyMap: Empty map — sync the galactic map from Settings.
startPage.rsiInstructions: Sign in to your account in the RSI window. Your hangar scrape will start automatically.
startPage.errOpenRsi: Unable to open the RSI window.
startPage.statusConnectRsi: Sign in to RSI — the scrape will start automatically.
startPage.statusScraping: Scraping your hangar… (don't close the window)

loadout.rentedReadonlyDesc: base loadout cannot be modified for a rented ship.
loadout.noHardpoints2: No hardpoint for this ship (ShipData not synced).
loadout.acqNotStock: Not a known ship stock item

loadout.pickerMountHint: {{mount}} — choose a mount, or leave empty
onboarding.title: Initial sync
onboarding.intro: We're fetching all your data from RSI, the wiki and the services. You can close this window: the sync keeps running in the background (tracked in the top bar).
onboarding.badge.label: Syncing
onboarding.done.message: everything is synced, all that's left is to re-check your blueprints
onboarding.done.messageBackground: Your data is synced. The blueprints are still loading in the background — you'll be able to re-check your blueprints once loading is done (tracked in the top-bar pill).
onboarding.done.failuresIntro: Some steps couldn't be synced (you can re-run them in Settings):
